title: malvastrum hispidum
intro: Malvastrum hispidum, also known as hairy mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Malvastrum hispidum include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Malvastrum hispidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
